examples: But the slobber and attention is free!
Try to remember that sometimes slobber all over the face is not exactly what your partner wants.
After a while, a riot of colours dark chocolate and lollipop in my eyes, I slobber must leave, I eat like wolves and tigers eat.
Mandy had expected a weirdly folded arm, a contorted jaw, maybe some slobber, but he looked fine.
The 30th annual meeting of the World Economic Forum is drawing to a close, not with a bang but a slobber.
